title: Replace browsing functionality with 'Browse All Products' link bar

requirements.summary: Remove search and category filtering from ProductCatalogSection
acceptanceCriteria: Search input field is removed from ProductCatalogSection
Category filter buttons are removed from ProductCatalogSection
Products are displayed in the grid without any filtering controls

file_operations.description: Remove the search input field and category filter buttons from the ProductCatalogSection component. Keep only the products grid display with loading skeletons and empty state handling. Preserve the section heading and product grid layout.

requirements.summary: Add 'Browse All Products' horizontal bar with catalog link below products grid
acceptanceCriteria: A horizontal bar component is rendered below the products grid
The bar displays the text 'Browse All Products'
The bar includes a clickable link that preserves the catalog URL/navigation
The bar styling matches the design pattern used previously in the application

file_operations.description: Add a horizontal bar component below the products grid that displays 'Browse All Products' text with a clickable link. The bar should use styling consistent with the application's design pattern (similar to previous bar implementations). Position it after the products grid but before the section closing tag. Ensure the link preserves the catalog navigation structure.
